data.title: SHIB price prediction: Caution ahead as RSI is at 46.66 and MACD momentum is bearish. Technical signals point to consolidation with limited price discovery.
data.description: The cryptocurrency SHIB is currently showing a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 46.66, coupled with a bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) momentum. This indicates a consolidation phase for SHIB, with limited ability to discover new prices, likely due to narrow trading ranges.

data.title: Excess token supply jeopardizes crypto's value creation as it mars returns and severs link between fundamentals and price.
data.description: There has been a significant increase in the token supply, leading to a dilution of returns and disrupting the connection between fundamentals and price in the cryptocurrency market. This phenomenon is causing worries about the sustainability of the long-term model of crypto, with a growing number of tokens circulating in the market. The excessive supply is affecting the relationship between the value of these digital assets and their underlying fundamentals, prompting concerns among investors and analysts about the future direction of the industry.

Maintaining critical support at $1.66 is crucial to avoid a further drop below $1.60.

data.title: Anthropic starts PAC as tensions rise over AI policy, facing scrutiny on political balance and dispute with Pentagon. #AI #PAC
data.description: Anthropic, an AI company, has established a Political Action Committee (PAC) that is funded by its employees. This move comes as the firm is under scrutiny for potential political bias and is involved in a escalating conflict with the Pentagon regarding the utilization of AI technology. The PAC's purpose and specific goals remain undisclosed, but Anthropic's decision to create this political funding mechanism raises questions about the company's stance on political issues. This development comes amid a backdrop of mounting concerns about the influence of tech companies in politics and society.
